chunks.text: ORDER IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Civil Revision No. S – 85 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.618/2023 (S/A) 24.03.2025 Mr. Ali Gul Abbasi, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, learned counsel for the applicant submits that Mr. Achar Khan Gabol has instructed him not to press this Civil Revision Application as per instructions of his client. Accordingly, this Civil Revision Application is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application. Judge ARBROHI
